full_description: Habit Tracker is an app designed to help you build positive habits and break negative ones. It allows you to set reminders and track your progress. With Habit Tracker, you can create a customized habit plan, set realistic goals, and monitor your progress over time. The app sends you reminders to perform your habits at the scheduled time, helping you stay on track. You can also view detailed statistics and insights into your habit formation, allowing you to identify areas for improvement. Whether you want to start exercising regularly, read more often, or simply drink more water, Habit Tracker is the perfect tool to help you achieve your goals.
